criterion_description: Multiple diagnostically sound real trading days are collected for each candidate strategy universe.
acceptance_threshold: multi-day real L2 coverage with documented gaps and symbol coverage

criterion_description: Predictive results are rerun and stable on real multi-day holdout data.
acceptance_threshold: real multi-day predictive baseline, calibration and stability pass

criterion_description: Economic P&L is validated on real multi-day or untouched holdout data with reconciled costs.
acceptance_threshold: retail/stress economics remain positive after broker/fill/cost reconciliation

criterion_description: Robustness checks are rerun on multiple real days and compared to synthetic scenarios.
acceptance_threshold: real multi-day strategy behavior is stable and not synthetic-specific

criterion_description: Synthetic/holdout realism is checked against real multi-day strategy behavior.
acceptance_threshold: real behavior matches accepted synthetic/holdout envelopes without artifact dependence
